svg.title: AWS chatbot architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram for the serverless chatbot proof of concept and the LibreChat on EC2 deployment.
svg.text: Serverless RAG proof of concept and real LibreChat deployment using Amazon Bedrock
CloudFront, S3, Lambda API, and Bedrock Knowledge Base
Official LibreChat Docker Compose stack with Bedrock models
Serverless path: CloudFront serves the React app. API Gateway invokes Lambda, and Lambda calls Bedrock Knowledge Bases for RAG.
LibreChat path: the EC2 instance runs the official Docker Compose stack and uses its instance profile for Bedrock access.
AWS Architecture Icons source: Official AWS Architecture Icons package, Icon-package_04302026.
